node.statement: (Electron-electron scattering example) For e⁻+e⁻ → e⁻+e⁻ Coulomb scattering with partial-wave truncation L ≤ L_max, spin-1/2 ⊗ spin-1/2, conserving J_z and parity P=(-1)^L: the inclusive channel (trace out one electron, detect spin) has Kraus rank bounded by BP. SDP verification confirms the bound for L_max = 1,...,4.
